name: Review Inc
description:
‍

Source: Review Inc

Features

  • Tracks reviews across multiple platforms, including Google, Yelp, Facebook, and industry-specific review sites, providing a centralized view of customer feedback.
  • Sends automated emails or SMS messages to customers, prompting them to leave reviews after interacting with the business.
  • Collects and displays reviews from various sources on a single dashboard, making it easier to manage and respond to feedback.
  • Allows businesses to create and distribute custom surveys to gather specific feedback from customers.
  • Enables businesses to respond to reviews directly from the platform, improving customer engagement and addressing concerns promptly.
  • Analyzes the sentiment of customer reviews to identify trends and areas for improvement.
  • Provides detailed reports and analytics on review performance, sentiment trends, and customer satisfaction metrics.
  • Offers widgets to display reviews on the business's website, enhancing SEO and showcasing positive feedback to potential customers.

Benefits

  • Centralizes review monitoring and response, allowing businesses to manage their online reputation effectively and efficiently.
  • Automates the process of requesting reviews, leading to a higher volume of customer feedback and improved online presence.
  • Provides valuable insights into customer sentiment and feedback, helping businesses identify strengths and areas for improvement.
  • Facilitates timely and personalized responses to reviews, improving customer satisfaction and loyalty.
  • Delivers detailed analytics and reports that help businesses make data-driven decisions to enhance their services and customer experience.
  • Aggregates and displays reviews on the business's website, contributing to better search engine rankings and increased visibility.
  • Simplifies the process of managing reviews across multiple platforms, saving time and resources for the business.
  • Showcases positive reviews and customer feedback, building trust and credibility with potential customers.

Pros 

  • Has a great customer support team

Cons 

  • Schema Markup has issues
  • The UI can be made much better 

‍

Offers custom pricing options

‍
